description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern JavaScript, covering features from ES2015 through ES2022 in a multiple‑choice format. It is positioned as a light‑hearted, self‑paced test of JavaScript proficiency, suitable for developers who want to gauge their grasp of recent language updates. The tone is informal and encouraging, emphasizing quick skill verification without any registration barriers.
Topics: ES2015 (ES6) features, ES2020–ES2022 language enhancements, JavaScript syntax and semantics, Modern JavaScript best practices
Audience: Front‑end developers, JavaScript engineers, and web programmers looking to validate or refresh their understanding of recent ECMAScript versions.
